reviews.review_description: A great city building game I can just sit and create with. Lots of personality and great use of VR.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the kind review JumpingAllen! We're happy you're enjoying the game!

reviews.review_description: My favorite city builder 👍

developer_response.body: Thanks APEboys! Glad you're enjoying the game!

reviews.review_description: Learning about the gameplay through your video was brilliant. Since watching it I've been thoroughly enjoying the game. It just needs more levels please 😊

developer_response.body: Hi Snuggles! Glad that the tutorial video was helpful! We also hope to be able to add more to the game at some point, but it's just hard to commit to anything right now. Hoping for the best!

reviews.review_description: add a upade where you can put 2  OR MORE POWER THINGS BC I SPENT 10 SRAP ON THE THINGS
Sweet little Cosy building simulation.

developer_response.body: Hi Simeonski! Thanks for the kind review! Glad to hear you're enjoying our game.

reviews.review_description:
Love the gameplay and the atmosphere. Playing in mixed reality brought a great sense of whimsy to my living room. The custom music is such a nice touch. 

Took off a star because it froze on me several times and I'd have to quit and restart the app to get it back running again. If you're manually saving it doesn't detract from the experience too much though.

developer_response.body: Hi Cant.take.the.sky (great username btw :) Thanks for this kind review! Sorry to hear about those crashes you're experiencing... that doesn't sound normal. We'll look into that, especially if other players are experiencing it too. Haven't had reports so far, but we'll keep an eye on that! Thanks for playing, and glad that you're enjoying the music (that's my contribution :)

reviews.review_description: I love this game. The music is really good, gameplay is fun, and there’s no other game like it. There is one thing I need to ask. Are you guys ever gonna add new levels the levels right now are really great, but I want some more content

developer_response.body: Thanks Jamesonpaul, happy to hear that you like the game so much!  We'd love to add more content to the game, just as soon as our company finances allow us too :D

reviews.review_description:
Dont bother paying attention to the negative reviews, just a bunch of trolls trying to play every game for free. Tutorial doesnt need work either. If you really cant look at your own menus yourself and figure out the dynamite is probably for blowing up buildings and the trash bin witha  recycling symbol is probably exactly what it looks like.

These things are common sense. Stop forcing every game to have long, boring, pointless tutorials. If youre too brain-damaged from micro-plastics, its not game developers responsibility to tailor a game for you when youll just get it refunded when youre done with it.

The game has great, funky music. The graphics are cute. The setting is relaxing and the game is super easy to figure out. Minor glitches and bugs exist in all games. Nothings perfect and no one cares.

Definitely needs more levels and/or content because its a bit short but most of the good games are anyway...

Nothing wrong with the game at all. I do have one weird glitch that might be quest related rather than game but i have no icon in my library for the game. I have to search it...i havent deleted and reinstalled but thought id mention that.

Not a real problem, just weird.

developer_response.body: Hey there RadiantAsena! Thanks so much for this comprehensive review! We're so glad you enjoyed SFC.

reviews.review_description: Bought the game recently. I'm only a few hours in and I'm addicted. Doesnt get boring. A really nice, comforting game to pass the time. Surprised I hadn't heard of this masterpiece earlier.

developer_response.body: Hi Jaxzz! Thanks so much for this kind review! We're so glad you are enjoying our little game :D

reviews.review_description: I love this game and I really enjoy the radio. I do wish there were more levels because I would play all of them.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! Especially glad you liked the soundtrack, because that was my contribution to the game :D You can find the soundtrack on all streaming services and Bandcamp, so enjoy!!

reviews.review_title: My favorite game on Quest so far
reviews.review_description: I've played this game for more hours than any other quest game/app combined. It's really fun and allows creativity and a great city building experience. Devs: is there any plans for more updates or even a sequel? Spacefolk Planet or something would be great

developer_response.body: Hi Boodacious! Thanks for the lovely review! We don't have plans for more content updates just at this moment, but Spacefolk City is always close to our hearts. As soon as finances can allow for it, we'd love to continue releasing new stuff for the folk!

reviews.review_description: I had such a hard time to pull away from the game 🎮 5 stars ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

developer_response.body: Hi Babytooth! Thanks so much for checking out our game, and leaving this nice review!

reviews.review_description: I enjoyed this game so much! i hope they add more missions soon 🤞

developer_response.body: Hi elenawins! Thanks for this kind review! We hope to add missions too, but as a tiny team budget and time is always the limitation. This is a game that's always close to our hearts though, so hopefully we can find a way!

reviews.review_description: Don't mean to be all morbid and stuff but this game deff help save my life. There's times when I'm so fed up with the world that I just wanna call it Kurt Cobain sometimes but I just end up playing this little cozy game and it's like I forgot stuff even matters anymore! So with all my heart thank you to the creators for helping me stay safe! If you wanna lose yourself in just some pure innocent fun deff invest in this game you won't regret it!

developer_response.body: Hi RubyStag... this is Alex typing here from Moon Mode. Thanks so much for the kind review, and also for sharing with us how our game has helped you! We were all really moved by your message here. We only had modest intent for bringing a little joy to the world with SFC, so to hear that it's played a part in giving you some relief and happiness is just overwhelmingly wonderful. Thanks to YOU for playing, from all of us at Moon Mode... and all the best to you! -- Chris, Rosie and Alex

reviews.review_description: This is more fun than I expected! I stayed up way too late playing - definitely worth the $20!

developer_response.body: Hi schelle! Thanks so much for the nice review!

developer_response.body: Hi Jaden, sorry to hear that our game didn't click with you! .😢

The chilliest and calm game ever. Even when

What ever you like, shooters, puzzles, or calm games this is for you and your friend and your whole family. I wish that moon modr makes more updates and games. This game is a masterpiece and should be bought immidiatly

reviews.review_description:
So my original post was four stars with the only complaint being that the extras didn’t work because of a lack of new citizens. I don’t know if they did anything different, I sure didn’t look anything else up after their response the first time.

BUT IT IS NOW A COMPLETE  PACKAGE. I mean they work and sorry about the caps, but it’s an effective way to grab reader’s attention today.

Anyways, now it’s just what I wanted.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review -- we're looking into this problem!!

reviews.review_description:
I love this game! So well thought out, easy playing. Yet also such a fun building game. 
Also works great on my quest 1 which I'm ever so thankful for!

developer_response.body: Hi DuckLyfe (great name 😁) Thanks for this kind review! Glad that you're enjoying the game!

reviews.review_description: This is an awesome game  I play it everyday for hours!

developer_response.body: Thanks for this kind review Jewels! Really happy that you're enjoying the game!

reviews.review_description: City builder games are my favorite type of VR games, but the wonderful little characters with their individual themes make this one my absolute favorite. For the most part, it’s just fun and relaxing. And I say “most part” because the “survive the solar flare” level stressed me out ( it took me a minute to figure out how to get through it). But then the sandbox-play option made it all better. This game is colorful, interesting, adorable, fun and good for hours of play. Worth every penny.

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for taking the time to drop a review! ❤️

reviews.review_description:
Remove the dots between dot. Com, use it in your brower and get 25% off when buying!!

You know when you were little and played with lego or sim city, wondering how it would look like in real life and not fanta sea?! This is the game for you in all his cuteness.

It just does not work

developer_response.body:
Hi Cielito._3!
I'm really sorry you struggled to get into the game, there is a tutorial in level 1 that explains the basics of how to play - as well as that, a couple of us have made a video explanation you can watch here for more tips: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OZunUEoCM4E

reviews.review_description: Cool characters, but sometimes hard to tell where you can place buildings, had to figure out on my own you can only recycle things in home icon, building is really slow! Good game overall, but need a more descriptive tutorial! Also, buildings don't always finish like they're supposed to and I have to start over.
Was Definitely looking for a sim game to sink my teeth into. This one’s colorful aesthetic and accessible gameplay was enjoyable and hard to put down.

Good game but sandbox does not give you infinity scrap 
good game but sandbox sucks
The game is fun but it doesn’t save the city’s you spend so much time building when you turn the game off.  Very frustrating.

Hi Thomasfab4!
You can't save during the first, tutorial level, but after that you can save and load at any time you want - Hope that helps!

reviews.review_description:
This is a fun and visually neat game. From opening and pouring drinks to making more complex drinks with garnish. If you like cooking sims with challenge this one won’t disappoint. Here is a code to save you a little.  

https://www.oculusappreferrals/Shanron80/3566126356743668/?utm_source=2

Add .com/ after oculus
There are a few glitches here and there but overall I am a huge fan! I hope there will be an extension or added levels.  In the moon mode discord the developers are keen to fix the bugs. Thanks

developer_response.body:
Hey Alar.wen! 

Thanks for taking time to leave a review! There are definitely things we are still working on updating and fixing, and we're hoping you'll find the game more enjoyable as more updates go out. For extensions and more levels, the discord is a great place to watch - we'll post as soon as we have news on that front! 

Thank you again, and please let us know if you encounter any other issues or bugs!

reviews.review_title: A great game that can only go up
reviews.review_description: The core of this is a lot of fun. I like the large variety of people that can join the community. Placing buildings can sometimes be a little frustrating to place, but not overly bothersome. The main gripe about the game is how disappointing the sandbox mode, it only has one map with only one place for the power station, which limits the size of the town. I believe that if the sandbox was expanded on then the game will improve dramatically. I look forward to more updates in the future!

developer_response.body: Hi there Uncle Rirruto! Thanks very much for the review. I wanted to just let you know that we've recently released a patch to the game which (among other fixes!) adds more clouds to the sandbox mode! Hopefully that should help give you more potential options for layouts there! UPDATE: I just thought to also mention that if you have a save-game in the Sandbox level, then it'll continue to play as normal. When you come to start a new Sandbox level, then you'll start with a level that features more clouds! (Multiple save slots is something we're hoping to bring in the future!)

reviews.review_description: i have to keep checking the time while i play this or i lose hours to it!! if you're a fan of building sims or are looking for a cute casual game get this one. def check out the discord as well on their main site because the devs are super quick to reply to any questions or bugs discovered by the players.

After playing the Trial and taking sometime to think about buying the game I finally did it. I really like the game its cute, relaxing, and I don't have to worry about swinging my hands into the wall lol. So after you try the demo and if you like the game as well, use this promo code to get 25% off. Have fun!

I absolutely love this game. I’m fairly obsessed. I love the little people just wandering with like four plants for no reason at all 😂 

Only thing I would have liked more would be in it explained how the buildings can connect with the different doors

developer_response.body:
Hi IvyPepper! 

We know there are some issues with the current tutorial, and that there are things that are not explained very well! We're working on making this better - we did make a gameplay tutorial video that we hope can maybe help with some of the issues until we can correct them in game! 

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OZunUEoCM4E

We hope you'll enjoy the video and the new tutorial once that's in. Many thanks for playing and for leaving a review!

reviews.review_description: Very interesting game, I can construct my city everyday.
Awesome game with a killer soundtrack!

reviews.review_title: A BIG fruity best rating in my book.
reviews.review_description: So far this is a one of a kind city building game for the Osculus2 and even when the next city building game comes out this one will still be one of a kind in my opinion. I have played alot of building games from Sim city and beyond but this one is quite different . Catch asteroids and rip them apart so your little fruit headed inhabitants can use the material for completing the structures you decide to place. There are not alot of structural choices but just enough so someone can jump right into the game and start playing without much experience in this type of game and catch on quickly. It kinda of reminds more of building a doll house with alot of rooms more so than a city but in a good way to make it interesting for all ages.

I love these adorable spacefolk "aliens"! The game is very fun to play if you're into city building strategy games. It's challenging in a way that you have to strategize where to place your buildings, and don't forget the time limit before solar flares destroy your city! 

Dizziness: 2/10 
At first I got dizzy because there are times that  we have to spin the city around to have a good view. even if you're just aitting down. 

Replayability: 7/10
This game tends to get repetitive once you know how to go about it. But if you like city building games, then this game is one of those nostalgic games that you can come back to, and play a casial game every now and then. 

I hope the devs will keep updating this game.

- Please add coop mode.

developer_response.body:
Hey Aoenne! 

Thank you for your lovely review! We're currently working on updates for the game, and the current plan is to continue that work and push out new updates - we hope you'll find those enjoyable too! 

I'm sorry to hear about you getting slightly dizzy from the game - we have tried to reduce any triggers for motion sickness that we could think of... If you have the space I would recommend trying to play with room scale and try walking around the city instead of rotating with the controllers - hopefully that will reduce or remove that twinge of motion sickness you feel! 

Co-op mode, that would be something, wouldn't it...! I will bring your wish about coop-mode to the team and see what they say :) 

Many thanks again for taking time to leave a review and letting us and other players know your thoughts and feelings!

reviews.review_title: GET IT SO CUTE AND CUSTOMIZALBE
reviews.review_description: This game is so amazing for those who want to build and pretty much customize everything and moving anything anywhere. Outside of the actual goals of expanding the city and everything I find myself decorating and making areas above and around their houses. I especially like the houses that aren’t that and have a slanted side. Since things float and stay in place, you can create great backgrounds and it adds another layer of depth into it. You can even mostly customize the size of the objects All of the characters are so cute.  You’ll just be working away and then suddenly they have a tiny plant, sign, pizza, literally whatever they want and it’s so adorable.
A fun little city builder. The diff scenarios are fun. Feels slow getting new species/races in sandbox but overall it’s worth it!

developer_response.body: ❤️ Thank you for the review, and five stars to boot!

reviews.review_title: Nice game with a saving issue.
reviews.review_description:
**Update: thanks for your quick attention to my issue. Much appreciated! All looks to be working properly now.  Gladly giving 5 stars as the game is fun and I really appreciate your effort to making sure your game worked for me. 

Game looks great & plays really smoothly. One big issue I'm having is that when I try to load a saved city, it throws all of my buildings into a pile and my citizens are all gone with no way to rebuild. I've had to restart the 3rd level over many times because of this.
I'd like to give it 5 stars, but being that I can't load my saved game successfully, I can't right now.
Hopefully this is something that can be fixed.

developer_response.body: Hey Zigphill! Happy to hear everything worked out! It was a scary bug that came out of nowhere it seemed but should be fixed now... Thanks for letting us know so we could fix it and make sure no more players have to experience it, and thank you for the review! 🙏
